scroll_found.title: Research the Rec Companions scroll at a Research Pedestal

greet.title: Introduce yourself to 3 MCA Reborn villagers — build relationship through dialogue

subtitle.text: You didn't survive this long by being alone. But you have been.

description: CH.02 · ON COMPANIONS
▸ MCA Reborn replaces default villagers.
They have names. They talk. They remember.
They can follow you, trade with you,
and in time — stay with you.
◈ MCA REBORN MECHANICS
└ Talk to villagers using right-click
└ Build relationship through gifts and dialogue
└ Hire as a Guard, Archer, or Farmer companion
└ Marriage requires a Rose Gold Ring
└ Married companions share your respawn point
└ Children can be born — they grow up over time
◈ SCROLL: On Companions
└ Found in: village gift chests, abandoned homes,
traveler road loot, inn chests
└ Research time: 10 min
└ Unlocks: relationship mechanics awareness,
companion hiring knowledge
▸ The Wanderer's Notes said: give the map to someone.
The Companion's scroll says: bring someone who can read it.
▶ Find the On Companions scroll [check]
▶ Introduce yourself to 3 MCA villagers [check]
◇ Rose Gold is a Numismatics ore alloy.
Find it in mesa biomes and cave deposits.
Ch02 → Ch05 is where relationships solidify.
